metadata.title: WKB vs Exact Transmission — Rectangular Barrier

beats.narration_text: Hej. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of wkb vs exact transmission. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of wkb vs exact transmission
output: ✓ WKB vs Exact Transmission — Rectangular Barrier

beats.narration_text:
WKB vs Exact Transmission is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. Exact quantum-mechanical transmission (RED) versus WKB approximation (SLATE dashed) for a rectangular potential barrier.
  Below the barrier: both shown. Above: resonances where T→1 (only exact shown). This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
beats.new_visual_element: Concept card: WKB vs Exact Transmission

beats.narration_text: Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of WKB vs Exact Transmission. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: V₀ (eV), L (nm), E probe =. Verify: Exact quantum-mechanical transmission (RED) versus WKB approximation (SLATE dashed) for a rectangular potential barrier.. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of WKB vs Exact Transmission. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: V₀ (eV), L (nm), E probe =. Verify: Exact qua

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: wkb vs exact transmission. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag V₀ (eV) from 0.5 to 3. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of V₀ (eV) from 0.5 to 3

beats.narration_text:
Exact quantum-mechanical transmission (RED) versus WKB approximation (SLATE dashed) for a rectangular potential barrier.
  Below the barrier: both shown. Above: resonances where T→. Exactly as the equations predict.
One prompt. A live demonstration of wkb vs exact transmission. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this WKB vs Exact Transmission simulation and add a second slider that controls V₀ (eV). Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.
